argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const page = {{ page }} || 1; const status = "{{ status }}" || 'all'; const statusMap = { all: 0, published: 1, reviewing: 3, scheduled: 0 }; const statusNum = statusMap[status] ?? 0; const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/janus/douyin/creator/pc/work_list?page_size=' + limit + '&page_num=' + page + '&status=' + statusNum; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); const normalizeStatus = (s, publicTime) => { if (typeof s === 'number') return s; if (!s) return publicTime && publicTime > Date.now() / 1000 ? 'scheduled' : 'published'; if (s.is_delete) return 'deleted'; if (s.is_prohibited) return 'prohibited'; if (s.in_reviewing) return 'reviewing'; if (s.is_private) return 'private'; if (publicTime && publicTime > Date.now() / 1000) return 'scheduled'; return 'published'; }; let items = res.data?.work_list ?? res.aweme_list ?? []; if (status === 'scheduled') { items = items.filter(v => (v.public_time ?? 0) > Date.now() / 1000); } return items.map(v => ({ aweme_id: v.aweme_id, title: v.desc ?? '', status: normalizeStatus(v.status, v.public_time), play_count: v.statistics?.play_count ?? 0, digg_count: v.statistics?.digg_count ?? 0, create_time: new Date((v.create_time ?? v.public_time ?? 0) * 1000).toLocaleString('zh-CN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Tokyo' }) })); }
